title: TRIPOD+AI / CLAIM conformance checklist generator
context: The canonical schema integrates TRIPOD+AI (2024) and CLAIM (2024) reporting items. Currently, conformance with these checklists is assessed manually by the ML/technical reviewer. A checklist generator that auto-scores a canonical model-card object against the TRIPOD+AI and CLAIM reporting items would make conformance visible, repeatable, and auditable — reducing reviewer burden and making completeness gaps explicit before review. A card's completenessScore is currently computed manually; this tool operationalizes it.
objective: Build and ship a TRIPOD+AI / CLAIM conformance checklist generator that auto-scores a canonical model-card object against the reporting items from both standards, producing a machine-readable conformance report and contributing to the card's completenessScore.
acceptanceCriteria: Generator scores a canonical model-card object against the TRIPOD+AI (2024) and CLAIM (2024) reporting items, producing a per-item PASS/FAIL/NOT-APPLICABLE result with the field(s) that satisfy each item.
Generator computes a summary completenessScore (0–100) from the item results, consistent with the project's scoring definition in PLAN.md.
Output is a machine-readable JSON conformance report; a human-readable Markdown rendering is also produced.
Committed golden canonical-to-conformance-report fixtures are diffed in CI; the pinned TRIPOD+AI and CLAIM versions are recorded in specVersions.
Code is MIT-licensed; pnpm build && pnpm test && pnpm lint pass; no credentials or patient data in any committed file.
resources: PLAN.md — Healthcare reporting standards, specVersions, completenessScore definition
CLAIM — Checklist for AI in Medical Imaging (2024 update)
output: A merged PR adding a TRIPOD+AI / CLAIM conformance checklist generator with golden fixtures, CI integration, and pinned spec versions.
